name: stackfoundry
description: Install production SaaS modules as editable source code.

scripts.check:registry: pnpm registry:doctor && pnpm lint:cli && pnpm test:registry && pnpm registry:build && pnpm shadcn:verify
scripts.test:registry:dry: rm -rf /tmp/stackfoundry-test && mkdir -p /tmp/stackfoundry-test && pnpm cli list >/dev/null && pnpm cli presets >/dev/null && pnpm cli add api-keys --target /tmp/stackfoundry-test >/dev/null && pnpm cli diff api-keys --target /tmp/stackfoundry-test >/dev/null && pnpm cli add preset next-saas --target /tmp/stackfoundry-test --dry-run >/dev/null && pnpm cli add preset vendor-examples --target /tmp/stackfoundry-test --dry-run >/dev/null
scripts.test:registry:install: rm -rf /tmp/stackfoundry-install && mkdir -p /tmp/stackfoundry-install/next-saas /tmp/stackfoundry-install/vendor-examples /tmp/stackfoundry-install/cloudflare-native /tmp/stackfoundry-install/vercel-native && pnpm cli add preset next-saas --target /tmp/stackfoundry-install/next-saas >/dev/null && pnpm cli add preset vendor-examples --target /tmp/stackfoundry-install/vendor-examples >/dev/null && pnpm cli add preset cloudflare-native --target /tmp/stackfoundry-install/cloudflare-native >/dev/null && pnpm cli add preset vercel-native --target /tmp/stackfoundry-install/vercel-native >/dev/null
scripts.shadcn:verify: node --input-type=module -e "import { readFile } from 'node:fs/promises'; const vendor = JSON.parse(await readFile('public/r/vendor-examples.json', 'utf8')); if (vendor.type !== 'registry:block') throw new Error('vendor-examples must be registry:block'); if (!vendor.registryDependencies?.every((dep) => dep.startsWith('https://stackfoundry.dev/r/'))) throw new Error('preset dependencies must be absolute registry URLs'); const apiKeys = JSON.parse(await readFile('public/r/api-keys.json', 'utf8')); if (!apiKeys.files?.every((file) => file.target)) throw new Error('registry files must include target');"
